title: Ross Bhappu to Take Over as CEO of Energy Fuels as Company Enters Next Phase of Growth
raw_text: Energy Fuels Inc. (NYSE: UUUU) today announced that Ross Bhappu has been appointed as Chief Executive Officer, succeeding Mark Chalmers, as the Company enters its next phase of growth in uranium and rare earth production.
rationale: CEO succession is material exec change for UUUU.
